name: Nut Bolt Screw Puzzle Game
description: Think you can untangle the mess? Dive into the Screw Puzzle Nut & Bolt game, where the world of puzzles meets the thrill of mechanics! Embark on a thrilling adventure where bolts, nuts, and wooden puzzles meet in a puzzle-filled challenge. Dive into a world filled with conundrums, where every turn reveals a new twist in the game. If you love clever puzzles, wood-based challenges, and addictive screw puzzles, this is the perfect game to escape boredom and engage your brain. Every level presents a new twisted tangle of nuts, bolts, pins, and screws, testing your problem-solving skills and sparking your curiosity.
